title: Take Next Patient from Queue
description: The system shall automatically display the patient at the head of the queue and remove that patient from the queue when requested by a healthcare practitioner.
rationale: This requirement ensures that patients are seen in order of arrival, improving efficiency and fairness in patient care.
business_value: Improves patient satisfaction and reduces wait times by ensuring timely and orderly service.

source.description: As a healthcare practitioner, I need to take the next patient from the head of the queue so that patients are seen in order of arrival.

acceptance_criteria: The system displays the patient at the head of the queue.
The system removes that patient from the queue.
preconditions: There is a queue with multiple patients.
functional_constraints: The system must automatically provide the next patient when requested by a healthcare practitioner.
edge_cases: The queue is empty when a practitioner requests the next patient.
A practitioner attempts to remove a patient who has already been served.

interfaces.name: Queue Service API
interfaces.description: The requirement interacts with the Queue Service API to retrieve and update the queue status.

test_cases.description: Verify that the system displays the patient at the head of the queue when requested.
test_cases.expected_result: The system displays the first patient in the queue and does not remove them.

test_cases.description: Verify that the system removes a patient from the queue after displaying them.
test_cases.expected_result: The system updates the queue to remove the displayed patient, and the next patient is now at the head of the queue.

test_cases.description: Verify that the system handles an empty queue correctly.
test_cases.expected_result: The system displays a message indicating that the queue is empty and does not attempt to remove any patient.
